name: Maya Action: Open Scene
description: Creates a Maya action to open a .ma/.mb scene file. Chain multiple action nodes together via actions_in/actions_out, then feed the final actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    scene_path = inputs.get('scene_path') or self.get_parameter('scene_path', '')
    force = inputs.get('force')
    if force is None:
        force = self.get_parameter('force', True)

    action = {
        'type': 'open_scene',
        'scene_path': scene_path,
        'force': force
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added open_scene action for: {scene_path}')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
